steps.title: Compute the boundary list
steps.content: All answer choices use $x=3$, $5$, and $7$. Compute the right side of $y\lt6x+2$ for each value: $$6(3)+2=20$$ $$6(5)+2=32$$ $$6(7)+2=44.$$ The $y$-values must be less than $20$, $32$, and $44$, respectively.

steps.title: Compare choice C to the boundary
steps.content: Choice C has $y$-values $16$, $28$, and $40$. These satisfy $$16\lt20$$ $$28\lt32$$ and $$40\lt44.$$

steps.title: Eliminate the failed choices
steps.content: Choice A fails because it includes $y=20$ when $x=3$, and $20\lt 20$ is false. Choice B fails because $36\lt 32$ is false when $x=5$. Choice D fails because $24\lt 20$ is false when $x=3$. So choice C is correct.
